fields.explainZh: 光纤通道控制器的固件修订号/标识符。
fields.explainEn: Firmware revision number/identifier for this Fibre Channel Controller.

fields.explainZh: 磁带驱动器逻辑库序列号。
fields.explainEn: Tape drive logical library serial number.

fields.explainZh: 光纤通道驱动器的环路标识，对于其他接口类型驱动器未定义。
fields.explainEn: Loop ID for Fibre Channel drives,undefined for other interface type drive.

fields.explainZh: 光纤通道驱动器的环路标识模式，对于其他接口类型未定义。控制光纤通道连接上端口标识的协商。
fields.explainEn: Loop ID Mode for Fibre Channel drives, undefined for other interface types. Controls negotiation of the port ID on the Fibre Channel connection.

fields.explainZh: 8字节值代表驱动器的全局节点名称。
fields.explainEn: 8-byte value representing the World Wide Node Name of the drive.
Port ID for fabric attached Fibre Channel drive, undefined for other interface types.

fields.explainZh: 在通道中一个端口的全局名称。
fields.explainEn: World Wide Name of a port in the fibre channelfabric.

fields.explainZh: 协议实际速率，此对象的数值等于每秒千兆位的端口速度。
fields.explainEn: Actual speed as negotiated . The numeric value of this object is equal to the port speed in gigabits per second.
The IP address of this SNMP agent.
The host name for the system hosting the SNMPagent.
Description of the library SNMP agent.

fields.explainZh: 整个库系统的当前状态（包含所有附加的驱动器）。
fields.explainEn: Current status of the entire library system (including all attached drive).
URL of the library management application.

fields.explainZh: 库中的SCSI媒体转换器所分配的逻辑单元。
fields.explainEn: Assigned LUN of this library (virtual) SCSI media changer.

fields.explainZh: 第一个媒体传输元素地址。
分区的第一个导入/导出元素地址。
fields.explainEn: First Import/Export Element Address of the partition.

fields.explainZh: 分区中磁带驱动器的数目。
fields.explainEn: Number of tape drives in the partition.

fields.explainZh: 分区的第一个存储单元地址。
fields.explainEn: First Storage Element Address of the partition.

fields.explainZh: 分区的第一个数据传输单元地址。
fields.explainEn: First Data Transfer Element Address of the partition.

fields.explainZh: 在SCSI查询命令下显示的设备固件等级。
fields.explainEn: Device firmware level as would be reported in a SCSI Inquiry command.

fields.explainZh: 此驱动器在SCSI查询命令下显示的序列号。
fields.explainEn: Serial Number of the library that this drive is as reported in SCSI Inquiry command.
Total cartridge loads for the drive.
Location of the Drive in the Library.

fields.explainZh: 与此物理驱动器关联的逻辑库（分区）的名称。如果驱动器与逻辑库不关联，则此字段将是空白的。
fields.explainEn: Name of the logical library (partition)to which this physical drive is associated. If the drive is not associated with a logical library, this field will be blank.

fields.explainZh: 在SCSI查询命令下显示的设备模型。
fields.explainEn: Device Model as would be reported in a SCSI Inquiry command.

fields.explainZh: 在SCSI查询命令下显示的设备序列号。
fields.explainEn: Device serial number as reported in SCSI Inquiry command.

fields.explainZh: 在SCSI查询命令下显示的设备厂商。
fields.explainEn: Device Vendor as would be reported in a SCSI Inquiry command.

fields.explainZh: 如果所有们是打开的，则状态是打开状态。
fields.explainEn: The status is open, if any door is open.

fields.explainZh: 物理库的整体在线状态。
如果所有们是打开的，则状态是打开状态。
fields.explainEn: The status is open, if any door is open.

fields.explainZh: 表示冷却风扇整体状态。
接受请求，如果需要操作员操作。
fields.explainEn: yes, if operator Action is required.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
